name_cn:
DIOR Toujours New Vertical Small
Isn't it getting more beautiful the more you look at it!
Vertical shape, easier to carry by hand
Imagine walking around with this, looking so relaxed you might get invited for a street snap
Thoughtfully comes with a strap, can be carried by hand, crossbody, or shoulder, versatile styles
Perfectly matches any look!
16×18×12cm
